animals.label: Animals
prompts: a red fox curled up in autumn leaves, golden hour light, photorealistic
an octopus drifting through a coral reef, underwater photography, clear blue water
a snowy owl mid-flight against a misty pine forest, dawn light

landmarks.label: Landmarks
prompts: the Eiffel Tower at dusk, soft purple sky, distant city lights
the Great Pyramids of Giza under a clear blue sky, midday sun
the Sydney Opera House from the harbor, cloudy afternoon, calm water

foods.label: Foods
prompts: a stack of fluffy pancakes drizzled with maple syrup, pat of butter on top, morning light
a bowl of ramen with a soft-boiled egg and green onions, top-down food photography
a slice of New York cheesecake on a white plate, raspberry coulis, studio lighting

nature.label: Nature
prompts: a misty mountain valley at sunrise, layered ridges, no people, photorealistic landscape
a tropical waterfall cascading into a rocky pool, lush ferns, soft daylight
a vast desert dunes under a starry night sky, milky way visible

characters.label: Fictional Characters
prompts: a hooded wizard holding a glowing staff in a stone library, dramatic lighting
a weathered space marine in armor on an alien desert planet, twin suns
a samurai standing in falling cherry blossoms, traditional armor, dawn
